# anon.li

> Privacy-first platform providing anonymous email aliases and end-to-end encrypted file sharing.

## About

anon.li is a privacy-focused platform with two core products:

- **Alias**: Anonymous email forwarding. Create disposable email aliases that forward to your real inbox without exposing your personal address. Supports custom domains, PGP encryption, and reply-via-alias.
- **Drop**: End-to-end encrypted file sharing. Upload files encrypted in your browser with AES-256-GCM. Zero-knowledge architecture — the server never sees your encryption keys.

All services are open source and designed with a zero-trust security model.
